headline: Will Apple Hit $3 Trillion Market Cap This Week?
summary: After a not-so-enterprising first-half of the year, Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) shares began picking up steam in the second-half. An analyst at Wedbush said Sunday, Cupertino is inching closer to a milestone.

headline: Homeland Security Warns Of Critical Flaw In Widely Used Software By Apple, Cloudflare, Minecraft
summary: The Department of Homeland Security's (DHS) top cyber official has urged the government and private-sector organizations to address a critical cybersecurity flaw.

headline: How Freestyle Rap Became Big Business In The Spanish-Speaking World: The Story Of Urban Roosters
summary: By Hernán Panessi and Javier Hasse.

headline: Disney's 'West Side Story' Hits Sour Note With Puny $10.5M Opening Weekend
summary: There was good news and bad news for the Walt Disney Co.’s (NYSE: DIS) weekend release of Steven Spielberg’s reimagining of the classic musical “West Side Story.” The good news: the film premiered as the top-grossing title at the U.S. weekend box office.

headline: Max Verstappen Claims His First F1 World Championship: 5 Things You Might Not Know About The Formula One Driver
summary: Max Verstappen claimed his first F1 world championship title by overtaking rival Lewis Hamilton on the final lap of Sunday's Abu Dhabi Grand Prix.  Verstappen was able to catch and pass Hamilton after a late safety car restart.
